welcome: Ladies and gentlemen, the man of the hour... P J! Welcome to your Bachelor Blowout. Pick a door!
reveal-miami-0: Door 1... Miami, Florida! Miami?! PJ's gonna drop four hundred bucks on a club table and be asleep by eleven.
reveal-miami-1: Door 1... Miami, Florida! South Beach, baby — the only six-pack PJ's bringing is in the cooler.
reveal-miami-2: Door 1... Miami, Florida! PJ at a Miami pool party: sunscreen on the bald spot, socks still on.
lockin-miami: And it's official! P J is going to... Miami, Florida! Let's go!
reveal-cruise-0: Door 2... Bahamas Cruise! A cruise? PJ's gonna gain twelve pounds and call it the bachelor bulk.
reveal-cruise-1: Door 2... Bahamas Cruise! PJ on a boat — seasick by noon, king of the world by midnight, crying by one.
reveal-cruise-2: Door 2... Bahamas Cruise! Unlimited buffet and PJ on the same ship? She's gonna list to one side.
lockin-cruise: And it's official! P J is going to... Bahamas Cruise! Let's go!
reveal-keywest-0: Door 3... Key West, Florida! Key West — PJ on Duval Street is a danger to himself and at least three bar stools.
reveal-keywest-1: Door 3... Key West, Florida! Four nights in the Keys? PJ's liver just filed for divorce too.
reveal-keywest-2: Door 3... Key West, Florida! PJ in Key West: factor fifty sunscreen, factor one hundred regret.
lockin-keywest: And it's official! P J is going to... Key West, Florida! Let's go!
champ-keywest: Your champion is... Key West, Florida!
reveal-obx-0: Door 4... Outer Banks, NC! Outer Banks — PJ swears he'll grill, burns everything, then blames the propane.
reveal-obx-1: Door 4... Outer Banks, NC! A house with a pool table? PJ's gonna lose at his own game and still talk trash.
reveal-obx-2: Door 4... Outer Banks, NC! PJ at the beach: 'I'll just get a little color' — comes back a fire hydrant.
lockin-obx: And it's official! P J is going to... Outer Banks, NC! Let's go!
champ-obx: Your champion is... Outer Banks, NC!
reveal-nashville-0: Door 5... Nashville, Tennessee! Nashville — PJ sings one country song and suddenly thinks he's got a record deal.
reveal-nashville-1: Door 5... Nashville, Tennessee! Broadway, baby! PJ on a mechanical bull lasts a proud one-point-two seconds.
reveal-nashville-2: Door 5... Nashville, Tennessee! PJ plus Nashville hot chicken is a bathroom situation we'll be discussing for years.
lockin-nashville: And it's official! P J is going to... Nashville, Tennessee! Let's go!
reveal-myrtle-0: Door 6... Myrtle Beach, SC! Myrtle Beach — PJ's idea of golf is four beers and one swing.
reveal-myrtle-1: Door 6... Myrtle Beach, SC! PJ on the SkyWheel, screaming like he didn't choose to get on it.
reveal-myrtle-2: Door 6... Myrtle Beach, SC! Myrtle Beach: where PJ's tan lines and his dignity both vanish.
lockin-myrtle: And it's official! P J is going to... Myrtle Beach, SC! Let's go!
champ-myrtle: Your champion is... Myrtle Beach, SC!
reveal-southjersey-0: Door 7... South Jersey! South Jersey?! PJ found a way to throw a bachelor party AND make it to work Monday.
reveal-southjersey-1: Door 7... South Jersey! The boys at Wilson's — PJ runs the table, runs his mouth, then runs a tab he can't cover.
reveal-southjersey-2: Door 7... South Jersey! A free bachelor party in his own hometown. PJ, you absolute legend… and cheapskate.
lockin-southjersey: And it's official! P J is going to... South Jersey! Let's go!
